Item 1. Business

NVIDIA Corporation operates in two reportable segments: Compute & Networking and Graphics.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

We face supply chain concentration risk from a single foundry partner.

Our financial results depend on continued AI compute demand.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Revenue grew 126% year-over-year, driven by Data Center segment strength.

Gross margin expanded to 73%.

Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

Interest rate risk discussion follows.
